scripts.test:compile: compact compile --skip-zk src/main.compact ./src/managed/veil-protocol && compact compile --skip-zk src/bootstrap.compact ./src/managed/veil-protocol-bootstrap
scripts.compile: compact compile src/main.compact ./src/managed/veil-protocol && compact compile src/bootstrap.compact ./src/managed/veil-protocol-bootstrap
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist && cp -Rf ./src/managed ./dist/managed && cp ./src/main.compact ./dist && cp ./src/bootstrap.compact ./dist && cp -Rf ./src/modules ./dist
